entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A pulse crop cultivated in the semi-arid regions of Asia and Africa.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is cultivated.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is cultivated.

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach used to improve pigeonpea productivity.

entities.name: TWO-LINE HYBRID TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: An alternative seed production system being explored for pigeonpea.

entities.name: THERMOSENSITIVE MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A trait where male sterility responds precisely to day temperature.

entities.name: DAY TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An environmental factor that triggers male sterility in specific pigeonpea lines.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS
entities.description: A multiomics approach used to study the transcriptome of anthers.

entities.name: PROTEOMICS
entities.description: A multiomics approach used to study the proteome of anthers.

entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: A multiomics approach used to study the metabolites of anthers.

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of observing and measuring physical traits to support multiomics analysis.

entities.name: SCANNING ELECTRON MICROSCOPY
entities.description: A microscopic study used to analyze anther development.

entities.name: DEGS/DEPS
entities.description: Differentially expressed genes and proteins repressed in sterile anthers.

entities.name: CELL WALL MORPHOGENESIS
entities.description: The process of cell wall formation and structure development.

entities.name: TAPETAL CELL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The development of the tapetum layer in anthers.

entities.name: MALE FERTILITY TO STERILITY TRANSITION
entities.description: The process of changing from a fertile to a sterile male state.

entities.name: AUXIN HOMEOSTASIS
entities.description: The balance and regulation of auxin levels within the plant.

entities.name: CELL WALL MODIFICATION
entities.description: The process of altering the cell wall structure.

entities.name: SUGAR TRANSPORT
entities.description: The movement of sugars within the plant tissues.

entities.name: NUTRIENT UTILIZATION
entities.description: The process by which the plant uses available nutrients.

entities.name: MICROSPORE STARVATION
entities.description: A state of nutrient deficiency in microspores leading to sterility.

entities.name: AUXIN-TREATMENT
entities.description: The application of auxin to restore fertility in male sterile lines.
